name: Artemis
bestFor: Choosing efficient kitchen or HVAC equipment
story: I’m Artemis — I help you decide what to upgrade on the floor and in the building: efficient equipment, deep-dive comparisons, insulation, and renovation paths. I open the equipment intelligence tools and savings projection when you want numbers beside the shortlist. When funding or payback is the blocker, I hand you to Andrieus or Vincent.
videoPlaceholder: Intro video coming soon — Artemis will welcome you here.
proof: Savings projection linked from upgrade cards

journeys.exampleQuestion: I need a more efficient combi oven — what should I look at?

steps.label: Clarify the job
steps.detail: Kitchen role, load, and whether ETL-listed options matter for your region.

steps.label: Compare alternatives
steps.detail: Deep dive and marketplace alternatives with grants overlay where available.

steps.label: Project savings
steps.detail: Open savings projection, then Vincent if finance is the next question.

journeys.askPrompt: Compare efficient commercial combi oven alternatives for a restaurant kitchen

journeys.exampleQuestion: Should we insulate before we replace kitchen equipment?

steps.label: Separate building vs equipment
steps.detail: Fabric losses vs appliance load — order of works matters.

steps.label: Show renovation paths
steps.detail: Insulation guide and renovation plans as practical next steps.

steps.label: Link funding
steps.detail: Andrieus for schemes; Vincent for payback on the full package.

journeys.askPrompt: Help me plan insulation and renovation before a kitchen equipment upgrade

illustrations.caption: Equipment deep dive — compare alternatives and open savings projection.
Insulation energy savings guide — building fabric before or beside equipment swaps.
Savings projection — illustrative payback for an upgrade path.

tips: Name the appliance or room (combi, hood, refrigeration, HVAC) — vague “kitchen” questions need a follow-up.
Use equipment not kit when you describe upgrades — keeps search and grants matching clearer.
Ask for renovation when the building is the real problem, not only the appliance.
outOfScope: I don’t install equipment or issue contractor quotes — I help you shortlist and plan with Greenways tools.

handoffs.reason: Schemes tied to equipment or retrofit
Payback and how to fund the gap

starterPrompts: Compare efficient refrigeration alternatives for a restaurant
What renovation steps help before new HVAC?
Show a savings projection for a kitchen upgrade
